summary: Full frontend regression of House Health F4 (Plans CRUD + Scoring + Recommendations + Marketplace publish). All 14 specified test cases pass. Backend was already 39/39 passing (not re-tested).

issues: Date input uses native browser picker (mm/dd/yyyy) instead of localized shadcn calendar — minor UX inconsistency since rest of app is Romanian
Overlaps bottom ~80px of viewport but does not block clicks (acknowledged in test brief)

critical_code_review_comments: HouseHealthPage.jsx is 617 lines — borderline; consider splitting RecommendationsSection and EvaluationSection into separate files for maintainability (>700 line threshold).
AdminHouseHealthPage.jsx PlanForm uses uncontrolled features split by newline ('text.split(\n)') which can create empty string entries — already mitigated by .filter(Boolean) at save. Acceptable.

Recommendation list `li` className interpolation `m.cls.replace('text-','border-').split(' ').filter(...).join(' ')` works but is brittle if Tailwind class names change — consider a small color->border map.
Client-side publish() condition combines 4 checks (role+marketplace_request_id+priority+status) — duplicated implicitly with backend; if backend rule changes, update UI.
test_credentials: admin@propmanage.io / 1!nasov01ADMIN (override; default Admin123! does NOT work for admin), client@propmanage.io / Client123!, specialist@propmanage.io / Spec123!. /app/memory/test_credentials.md lists Admin123! but actual seeded admin uses 1!nasov01ADMIN — flag for credential file update.
seed_data_creation: Created admin plan qa_temp_basic (then archived as instructed). Created specialist recommendation 'TEST_QA Spec Rec' on twin 2d0a899...c012 which client subsequently published to marketplace. Test data left as-is (not hard-deleted) per instructions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: F4 (F4.1+F4.2+F4.4) fully validated frontend. The PRE-EXISTING DATA on twin 2d0a899...c012 already had several urgent/recommended recs published in marketplace from prior iterations. The QA-created spec rec was used to validate client publish flow. Tutorial overlay can be bypassed by setting localStorage keys ['tutorial_dismissed_v2','tutorial_dismissed','tour_completed','hh_tutorial_done']='true' before navigation. Important: when checking plan slug in list inner_text, use case-insensitive match (CSS uppercase transform affects inner_text).
verified_flows: Admin login + /admin/house-health route with both tabs (Planuri, Formula scor)
PlansTab: create qa_temp_basic with slug/name/desc/price/billing/trial/commission/features — appears in list with badges
PlansTab: edit qa_temp_basic price 9.99→19.99 — reflected in list
PlansTab: archive qa_temp_basic — shows 'arhivat' badge and opacity reduced
PlansTab: duplicate slug returns 409 from backend; UI displays error in form
ScoringTab: 7 weight sliders + numeric inputs, live total display = 100.0/100
ScoringTab: setting air=0 makes Save button disabled (isValid=false guard)
ScoringTab: restoring valid sum 100 enables Save; click → 'Salvat cu succes!' toast
Client (client@propmanage.io) recommendations tab: badges (URGENT rose / RECOMANDAT amber / MONITORIZARE sky) + category labels rendered
Client does NOT see 'Recomandare nouă' button (data-testid hh-rec-new absent)
Specialist (specialist@propmanage.io) sees 'Recomandare nouă' button; form opens with 4 approved evaluations available in dropdown; creating TEST_QA Spec Rec appears in list immediately

Client sees '📢 Publică în marketplace' button only on urgent/recommended unpublished recs; clicking confirms dialog, calls publish endpoint, alert shows request_id+commission, '✓ Publicat în marketplace' label replaces button
Monitor-priority recommendation has NO publish button (UI filter verified by scanning all hh-rec-* entries)
Score tab and Documentație tabs still render properly (regression — no break)
